eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Clark, KS; at 05:39 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 06:09 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: residents are asked to evacuate the following area immediately:  North of cr I to cr E and between cr 10 to 16.Evacuate to Minneola Civic Connection is open. Evacuate now
